title: Police Station Cover for Firms at Tonbridge and West Kent
primaryKeyword: police station cover Tonbridge west Kent firms
metaTitle: Police Station Cover Tonbridge West Kent Firms
metaDescription: Police station agent cover for criminal defence firms at Tonbridge custody and voluntary interviews across west Kent.
featuredImageAlt: West Kent police station cover for firms
contentHtml:
In brief

Criminal defence firms instruct police station cover at Tonbridge 24-hour custody and for voluntary interviews across Sevenoaks, Tunbridge Wells and west Kent.

Tonbridge custody

Tonbridge is the primary west Kent custody suite. Firms should include client details, interview or detention time, custody record number and DSCC reference when instructing.

Voluntary interviews

Voluntary interviews are regularly held at Tonbridge, Sevenoaks and Tunbridge Wells. Early instruction helps secure attendance and disclosure review time.

Instructing cover

Telephone for urgent custody. Email may be used for scheduled voluntary interviews. See Tonbridge cover page, solicitors agent cover, and firm instructions.

General information only.

faq.q: Do you cover both Tonbridge custody and voluntary interviews?
faq.a: Yes, subject to availability. Instruct with station, client details and interview or detention time.

author: Robert Cashman
